features: 【Flexi Rods Heatless Curlers】xnicx heatless curlers are suitable for all hair types and lengths, for curling long, medium, and short hair.And can be used with a silk hair wrap for sleeping to ensure your curls stay intact overnight.

【47pcs Hair Rollers】Hair Rollers set include 7 colors & 7 sizes:1.98cm,1.77cm,1.6cm,1.39cm,1.19cm,0.99cm,0.78cm. You can create salon-worthy styles from the comfort of your own home. Say goodbye to expensive hair appointments and hello to beautiful, long-lasting curls.

【Upgrade Heatless Curlers】xnicx hair curlers no heat and breakagea.Heatless Curls with ease using our Hair Rollers Bendy Foam Curler Rollers - the perfect alternative to damaging heat styling tools.Also Considerate Gift To Send Your Family And Friends.
【Lightweight and Easy to Carry】xnicx Flexi Rods equipped with a bundle pocket，convenience, take-to-go package for efficient storage.You can take to travel and hotels, enjoy a beautiful curls.

【Use Bendy Hair Rollers】 1. Comb freshly washed hair and divide hair into sections. 2. Wrap sections of hair around rods. 3. Secure rods by twisting toward scalp. 4. After at least 2 hours, Unrell and set curls free! Remember to spray on styling spray!
